title: indigofera trita var. subulata
intro: Indigofera trita var. subulata, also known as the upright stick indigo, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Indigofera trita var. subulata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimalarial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including extracts and tinctures.
